seo.title: POS Hardware for Restaurants | Gastro Master
seo.description: Professional POS hardware: terminals, receipt printers, card payment terminals & accessories. Direct from Gastro Master — including installation across Germany.

hero.sub: From compact POS systems to robust receipt printers and smart payment terminals. All devices are ready to use and perfectly matched to Gastro Master.
hero.heroImgAlt: Gastro Master POS hardware — terminals, printers and accessories

kasse.headline: POS Systems & Displays
kasse.sub: Professional solutions for your counter area — robust, fast, and ready to use immediately.

products.title: Elo Series-3
products.desc: All-in-one POS system with 15.6" touchscreen. Compact, powerful and ready to use — ideal for restaurants, cafés and fast food.

products.title: Elo Series-3 Doublescreen
products.desc: Two screens: one for you, one for the customer. The customer display ensures transparency at the counter and offers upselling potential.

products.title: Microsoft Surface Tablet
products.desc: Flexible and mobile. The Surface Tablet is ideal for food trucks, events and small businesses — take your POS system anywhere.

terminals.headline: Card Readers & Thermal Receipt Printers
terminals.sub: Card terminals and compact receipt printers — everything you need for a complete POS setup.

products.title: Adyen POS Terminal S1F2L
products.desc: Compact card terminal with touchscreen and integrated receipt printer for server order-taking at the table. Supports all common payment methods — debit, credit, Apple Pay and Google Pay.

products.title: Adyen AMS1 Terminal
products.desc: Slim table terminal for fast card payments. Ideal for mobile use at the table or directly at the counter.

products.title: Gastro Master 58mm Receipt Printer
products.desc: Our compact 58mm thermal printer for order-taking from the online shop and app when no point-of-sale software is used. Integrated SIM card optionally available for seamless order transmission.

printers.headline: 80mm Thermal Receipt Printers
printers.sub: Fast and reliable receipt printers for kitchen, bar and checkout — low maintenance and designed for continuous use.

products.title: Gastro Master 80mm Printer
products.desc: Our own receipt printer with 80mm print width. Fast, quiet and low maintenance — ideal for continuous use in hospitality.

products.title: Epson Receipt Printer TM-M30III
products.desc: The reliable Epson TM-M30III impresses with its compact design and high print speed. Supports cloud printing for modern hospitality systems.

products.title: Epson Receipt Printer TM-T20III
products.desc: A compact and proven receipt printer for daily use. The TM-T20III delivers reliable 80mm thermal printing at an excellent price-performance ratio.

accessories.headline: Accessories
accessories.sub: Complementary hardware for a complete, professional setup — from cash drawers to network cables.

products.title: Gastro Master Cash Drawer
products.desc: Robust cash drawer with 5 coin compartments and 3 banknote slots. Connects directly to your receipt printer via RJ11 cable.

products.title: Tablet Stand
products.desc: Adjustable aluminium stand for tablets at the checkout. Height-adjustable and tilt-proof — compatible with Surface and similar devices.

products.title: Surface Pro Protective Case
products.desc: Slim protective case with integrated keyboard for the Microsoft Surface Pro. Ideal for mobile use in hospitality — protects against impacts and splashes.

products.title: Network Patch Cable
products.desc: High-quality Cat 6 network patch cable (RJ45) for a stable, wired connection of your POS devices. Available in lengths of 3m, 5m and 10m.

compat.headline: Compatibility Overview
compat.sub: Which hardware is compatible with which Gastro Master product?

cta.headline: Configure Your Setup
cta.sub: All prices on request — individually tailored to your business. We advise you free of charge and create a suitable offer.

faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.sub: Answers to the most common questions about Gastro Master hardware.

items.q: Does Gastro Master deliver hardware directly?
items.a: Yes, we deliver all listed products directly to your business in Germany. On request, we also install and configure the devices on-site.

items.q: What is the warranty period for the hardware?
items.a: All devices come with a manufacturer's warranty of at least 2 years. For Gastro Master own products like the 80mm printer, we offer direct support and fast replacement in case of defects.

items.q: Can I use the hardware without Gastro Master software?
items.a: The card terminals and receipt printers are compatible with the ZVT standard and can generally be used with other systems. For optimal performance and direct integration, however, we recommend combining them with Gastro Master.

items.q: Does Gastro Master offer financing or leasing?
items.a: Yes, please ask us about our leasing and instalment payment options. We will find a solution that fits your budget — without high upfront investment.

items.q: How is the installation and setup carried out?
items.a: All devices are pre-configured by us and ready for immediate use. On request, we offer professional on-site installation by our technical team — nationwide across Germany.
